MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-FEB-20-2013:
Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. represented by Jordan San Pedro who is present with Attorney Margaret DeMatteo
Defendant GARY STEWART is present with Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is filed. The trial date of FEB-25-2013 is vacated.
